content.en:
【Natal Ancestral Fu: Copy】

Seeing the word Zu Fu, Ye Tian was shocked.

"Ancestral endowment, not holy endowment?"

Ye Tian thought that he was born with the natal endowment, but he didn't expect that it was the natal ancestral endowment that was born.

"Could it be that it has something to do with the second qualitative transformation of my Holy Soul?" Ye Tian thought to himself.

"That's not right!" Ye Tian shook his head, "It's definitely not the second qualitative change of the Holy Soul, in the Dark Holy Domain, there are not no people who have the second qualitative change of the Holy Soul, but the Natal Ancestor has not." It should have something to do with my large number of ancestral endowments, and I fused into too many sacred endowments, thus fusing into a sect ancestral endowment, which directly affected my holy soul, causing the most suitable natal endowment to be born into a natal ancestral endowment!"

The replication of the Natal Ancestral Fu has something to do with his replication ability, which is a talent that is extremely suitable for him.

Ye Tian's consciousness connected to the replication of the natal ancestral endowment and knew the effect of this ancestral endowment.

This copy is not the same as his copy talent, it is a copy skill.

For example, the Holy Technique and the Ancestral Technique, he can copy it and become his own Sacred Technique and Ancestral Technique.

This ability is terrifying, second only to his copying talent!

It can even be said that he was able to give birth to the ancestral gift of copying, and he also has the influence of copying talent.

Without the existence of the copy talent, he would not be able to form the Natal Ancestral Gift Copy.

"In this way, I don't need to exchange for ancestral skills!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, this ability seems to be awesome, but Ye Tian will not copy too many ancestral skills, and ordinary ancestral skills are of little use to him.

Moreover, he has a large number of ancestral endowments and derivative characteristics, and he can completely deduce a holy skill to the ancestral skill level, so the replication of the natal ancestral endowment can only be icing on the cake.

Moreover, there were very few Domain Ancestors of the Dark Sanctuary Ancestral Domain, and he probably couldn't copy any good Ancestral Skills.

"If you have a chance in the future, copy a few good ancestral skills!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Now, he had just broken through to the Invincible Domain Ancestor realm, and it was the time when his strength was rapidly improving, so he did not go out of the level, but continued to cultivate.

It is very difficult for the invincible domain body to be refined, and it will take a long time to refine it to the extreme.

However, he had gained too many benefits from the Holy Soul Realm, and many of them could refine the Invincible Domain Body, so he didn't have to worry about the cultivation speed.

But for now, he wants to improve the strength of the human race.

For example, if he obtains the Spatial Saint Endowment Crystal from the Holy Soul Realm, he can give it to nine people to obtain the Spatial Endowment.

In addition, he has obtained a lot of Star Soul Sand and Saint Sands, which can easily create an invincible domain ancestor.

"Son, daughter, Yue'er, Xiaoyu, come here!"

Ye Tian summoned his relatives.

Soon, Xiao Yue, Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue and Ye Yu came over.

"Husband!"

"Father!"

"Brother!"

They shouted.

"These holy blood marrow can reshape the foundation, and after you take it, the foundation remodeling is comparable to the top demon genius!"

Ye Tian took out the holy blood marrow and handed it to the four of them.

"Holy Blood Marrow!"

They hadn't heard of it, but they knew it was precious.

They didn't say anything polite to Ye Tian, they took it one by one, and then took the holy blood marrow in front of Ye Tian.

Bang!!!!

The four of them began to transform, and the whole person began to transform.

From the body to the soul to the source, everything is changing, and this is the true reshaping of the foundation.

For example, although some treasures can change the quality of the physical body, but the soul and origin cannot be changed, then it is not called reshaping the foundation.

After rebuilding their foundations, they will have a period of adaptation, during which they can quickly improve as long as they work hard.

Time passed day by day, and thousands of years passed, and the four of them completed the reshaping of their foundation.

At this time, Ye Tian stripped some holy endowments from himself and gave them to the four of them.

In this way, they also become the Holy Endowment.

In the past, he didn't dare to do this, for fear of leaking the Holy Endowment, and the impact would be too great.

But now he is not afraid, he obtained the Space Saint Endowment Crystal from the Holy Soul Realm, and when the time comes, he will select a few Terran geniuses and bestow the Space Saint Endowment.

In this way, other forces will also find out that he has obtained such a treasure, which can bestow on people, although he is envious, but Ye Tian has already used it, and they naturally can't snatch it anymore.

In that case, they would also think that Xiao Yue and the others' Divine Endowment were also created by using treasures such as the Space Sacred Endowment Crystal.

At that time, they only thought that Ye Tian's encounter was amazing, and they would never think of copying talent.

In the following days, Ye Tian began to select suitable candidates from among the geniuses of the human race, among which character was put first, and even personally assessed them again and again.

After millions of years and many assessments, eight Terran geniuses were selected and bestowed with space endowments.

Terran Temple.

Eight geniuses of the Terran came here, witnessed by many Terran domain ancestors.

Ye Tian took out the Space Saint Gift Crystal and said, "This treasure is something I obtained from the Holy Soul Realm, I don't know what it is called, I call it the Space Saint Gift Crystal, and today I will use it to give you eight a Spatial Saint Gift." After obtaining the Spatial Endowment, you have become a Saint, and your talent has leapt above countless geniuses!"

The Blessed One!!

When the eight Terran geniuses heard this, they were immediately excited.

They know what the Blessed One is!

There are not many saints in the Dark Sacred Realm, and only the heirs of the ancestors of the Superior Domain have hope of giving birth to the Holy Endowment!

Unexpectedly, these ordinary cultivators would have the hope of one day receiving the Holy Endowment.

The other Terran Domain Ancestors were very envious, and they wanted to snatch this Spatial Saint Gift Crystal, but they didn't dare to snatch it, it was a treasure that belonged to Ye Tian, and they were not qualified to obtain such a treasure.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian urged the Spatial Saint Endowment Crystal, and eight rays of light burst out from it and shot into the eight Terran geniuses.

Suddenly, the souls of the eight geniuses of the Terran Race seemed to have been transformed by a terrifying supreme force, and they were all in great pain, but they all endured it.

Day by day, a full number of months, before they were completely born with the Spatial Endowment.

At this time, they sensed their souls a little, and they knew about the existence of the space holy endowment, and they were extremely excited.

Immediately, they thanked Ye Tian one after another, and then retreated.

And then, Ye Tian went to the Battle Realm Tower and contacted the Fire Emblem War Ancestor.

He was going to trade the Spatial Endowment Spade to the Battle Gate, so as to prove that the Terran's Spatial Endowment really came from the Spatial Endowment Crystal, not the origin of his fabrication.

Therefore, he left a space for the Holy Gift.

After such a transaction, the battle gate will not suspect him, in fact, the forces will not doubt it either.
